hibernate-mapping.sql-query: with recursive ProcessHeaderContexts as ( select &&Context&& from &&ProcessHeader&& union select &&InstanceMetrics&& from &&ProcessHeader&& union select &&ProcessMetrics&& from &&ProcessHeader&& union all select tp.&&Id&& from ProcessHeaderContexts phc inner join &&TablePartMetadata&& tp on phc.&&Context&& = tp.&&TablePartOwner&& ) select e.&&Uid&&, e.&&Namespace&&, e.&&Name&&, p.&&Name&& as &&PropertyName&&, p.&&Uid&& as &&PropertyUid&&, p.&&SubTypeUid&&, p.&&RelationTableName&& from ProcessHeaderContexts phc inner join &&MD_ENTITY&& e on e.&&Id&&=phc.&&Context&& left join &&MD_ENTITY_PROPERTY&& p on p.&&OwnerId&&=e.&&Id&& where p.&&SubTypeUid&&<>:emptyUid

with cte as ( select &&Id&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& where &&ServerConnectionUid&& = :serverConnectionUid for update skip locked ) update &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi set &&ServerConnectionUid&& = null from cte where wqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&&

with cte as ( select boi.&&Id&& from &&BackgroundOperationInfo&& boi inner join &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi on wqi.&&BackgroundOperation&& = boi.&&Id&& where wqi.&&ServerConnectionUid&& is null and boi.&&Status&& = :activeStatus for update skip locked ) update &&BackgroundOperationInfo&& boi set &&Status&& = :pendingStatus from cte where boi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&&

with cte as ( select &&Id&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& where &&ServerConnectionUid&& is not null and &&LastTouchDate&& < :lastTouchDate for update skip locked ) update &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi set &&ServerConnectionUid&& = null from cte where wqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&&

with cte as ( select wqi.&&Id&&, wqi.&&ServerConnectionUid&&, wqi.&&NextExecuteDate&&, wqi.&&Instance&&, wqi.&&ServerConnectionName&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi where &&ServerConnectionUid&& is null and &&BackgroundOperation&& is null and &&NextExecuteDate&& <= :currentTimestamp and &&Attempt&& < :attemptLength order by wqi.&&Attempt&&, wqi.&&CreationDate&& limit :count for update skip locked ) update &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi set &&ServerConnectionUid&& = :serverConnectionUid, &&LastTouchDate&& = :currentTimestamp, &&ServerConnectionName&& = :serverConnectionName from cte where wqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&& returning cte.&&Id&&, cte.&&Instance&&

with cte as ( select wqi.&&Id&&, wqi.&&ServerConnectionUid&&, wqi.&&NextExecuteDate&&, wqi.&&Instance&&, wqi.&&ServerConnectionName&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi where &&ServerConnectionUid&& is null and not &&BackgroundOperation&& is null and &&NextExecuteDate&& <= :currentTimestamp and &&Attempt&& < :attemptLength order by wqi.&&Attempt&&, wqi.&&CreationDate&& limit :count for update skip locked ) update &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi set &&ServerConnectionUid&& = :serverConnectionUid, &&LastTouchDate&& = :currentTimestamp, &&ServerConnectionName&& = :serverConnectionName from cte where wqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&& returning cte.&&Id&&, cte.&&Instance&&

with cte as ( select &&Id&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& where &&ServerConnectionUid&& is null and &&Id&& = :id for update skip locked ) update &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi set &&Attempt&& = case when &&Attempt&& = :attemptLength then &&Attempt&& - 1 else &&Attempt&& end, &&NextExecuteDate&& = :currentTimestamp from cte where wqi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&&;

procedure.name: DeleteByWorkflowInstance

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select * from DeleteByWorkflowInstance(:instance, :statusActive, :statusPending, :statusPrepared) Id

procedure.text: create or replace function DeleteByWorkflowInstance(p_instance bigint, p_statusActive integer, p_statusPending integer, p_statusPrepared integer) returns setof bigint as $$ begin delete from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& where &&Id&& in ( select wqi.&&Id&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& wqi left outer join &&BackgroundOperationInfo&& boi on wqi.&&BackgroundOperation&& = boi.&&Id&& where wqi.&&Instance&& = p_instance and (wqi.&&BackgroundOperation&& is null or boi.&&Status&& = p_statusPrepared) ); delete from &&BackgroundOperationInfo&& where &&Status&& = p_statusPrepared; return query with updated as ( with cte as ( select boi.&&Id&& from &&BackgroundOperationInfo&& boi where boi.&&Id&& in ( select &&BackgroundOperation&& from &&WorkflowQueueItem&& where &&Instance&& = p_instance and not &&BackgroundOperation&& is null ) and boi.&&Status&& = p_statusActive for update skip locked ) update &&BackgroundOperationInfo&& boi set &&Status&& = p_statusPending from cte where boi.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&& returning cte.&&Id&& ) select updated.&&Id&& from updated; end $$ language plpgsql

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: with cte as ( select * from &&WfInstanceMigrationPackage&& where &&Status&& in (0, 4) order by &&CreationDate&& desc limit :count for update skip locked ) update &&WfInstanceMigrationPackage&& {wimp} set &&Status&& = 1 from cte where {wimp}.&&Id&& = cte.&&Id&& returning {wimp.*}

select ph.&&Id&& from &&ProcessHeader&& ph inner join &&ResponsibilityMatrixItem&& rm on rm.&&BPMNProcess&& = ph.&&Published&& left join &&OrganizationItem&& dep on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and dep.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& du on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&OrganizationItemId&& = dep.&&Id&& left join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& agu on rm.&&WorkerType&&=:usergrouptype and agu.&&GroupId&&=rm.&&WorkerId&& where ph.&&Parent&& is null and ph.&&RunAvailability&& in(:RunAvailability) and ph.&&Status&& = :publishedStatus and rm.&&HasStartEvent&& = 1 and ( (dep.&&UserId&& in (:userfilter) or rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&UserId&& in (:userfilter)) or (rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergrouptype and agu.&&UserId&& in (:userfilter)) )

procedure.name: LoadProcessGroupTree

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select &&Id&&, &&Name&&, &&ParentId&& from LoadProcessGroupTree() order by &&Name&&

select distinct ph.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, ph.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, ph.&&ParentGroup&& as &&ParentId&&, ci.&&CurrentInstanceCount&& as &&AvailableCount&&, ci.&&ActiveTasksCount&& as &&AssignToMeCount&&, ci.&&CompletedInstanceCount&& as &&CompleteCount&&, ci.&&TerminatedInstanceCount&& as &&InterruptedCount&&, wp.&&ShowIndicatorMode&& as &&ShowIndicatorMode&&, wp.&&ShowProblemMetric&& as &&ShowProblemMetric&&, wp.&&HasProblemMetri&&c as &&HasProblemMetric&&, wp.&&ShowWarningMetric&& as &&ShowWarningMetric&&, wp.&&HasWarningMetric&& as &&HasWarningMetric&&, wp.&&ShowGoodMetric&& as &&ShowGoodMetric&& from &&ProcessHeader&& ph inner join &&ResponsibilityMatrixItem&& rm on rm.&&BPMNProcess&& = ph.&&Published&& left join &&MonitorCacheItem&& ci on ci.&&ProcessHeader&& = ph.&&Id&& and ci.&&User&& is null left join &&OrganizationItem&& dep on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and dep.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& du on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&OrganizationItemId&& = dep.&&Id&& left join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& agu on rm.&&WorkerType&&=:usergrouptype and agu.&&GroupId&&=rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on ph.&&Published&& = wp.&&Id&& where (ph.&&Published&& is not null) and (ph.&&Status&& = :publishedStatus) and (:filterByResponsibilityLevel = 0 or rm.&&ResponsibilityLevel&& in (:responsibilityLevel) and ( (dep.&&UserId&& = :userId or rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&UserId&& = :userId) or (rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergrouptype and agu.&&UserId&& = :userId) )) and (:filterByCurator = 0 or rm.&&IsCurator&& = :isCurator and ( (dep.&&UserId&& = :userId or rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&UserId&& = :userId) or (rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergrouptype and agu.&&UserId&& = :userId) )) and (:filterByPermission = 0 or ph.&&Id&& in ( select p.&&ProcessHeader&& from &&ProcessHeaderPermission&& p inner join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& c on p.&&UserSecuritySetCacheId&& = c.&&SetId&& where c.&&UserId&& = :userId and p.&&PermissionId&& = :permissionId) ) order by ph.&&Name&&

select distinct ph.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, ph.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, ph.&&ParentGroup&& as &&ParentId&& from &&ProcessHeader&& ph inner join &&ResponsibilityMatrixItem&& rm on rm.&&BPMNProcess&& = ph.&&Published&& left join &&MonitorCacheItem&& ci on ci.&&ProcessHeader&& = ph.&&Id&& and ci.&&User&& is null left join &&OrganizationItem&& dep on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and dep.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& du on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&OrganizationItemId&& = dep.&&Id&& left join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& agu on rm.&&WorkerType&&=:usergrouptype and agu.&&GroupId&&=rm.&&WorkerId&& where (ph.&&Published&& is not null) and (ph.&&Status&& = :publishedStatus) and (rm.&&ResponsibilityLevel&& in (:responsibilityLevel) and ( (dep.&&UserId&& = :userId or rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&UserId&& = :userId) or (rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergrouptype and agu.&&UserId&& = :userId) )) or (rm.&&IsCurator&& = :isCurator and ( (dep.&&UserId&& = :userId or rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&UserId&& = :userId) or (rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergrouptype and agu.&&UserId&& = :userId) )) or (ph.&&Id&& in ( select p.&&ProcessHeader&& from ProcessHeaderPermission p inner join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& c on p.&&UserSecuritySetCacheId&& = c.SetId where c.&&UserId&& = :userId and p.&&PermissionId&& = :permissionId) )

select rm.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, rm.&&ResponsibilityLevel&&, rm.&&IsCurator&&, wp.&&Header&& as &&ProcessHeader&& from &&ResponsibilityMatrixItem&& rm inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on rm.&&BPMNProcess&& = wp.&&Id&& left join &&OrganizationItem&& dep on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and dep.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& du on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&OrganizationItemId&& = dep.&&Id&& left join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& agu on rm.&&WorkerType&&=:usergrouptype and agu.&&GroupId&&=rm.&&WorkerId&& where rm.&&BPMNProcess&& in (:processId) and ( (dep.&&UserId&& in (:userfilter) or rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&UserId&& in (:userfilter)) or (rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergrouptype and agu.&&UserId&& in (:userfilter)) )

with recursive t_Rec as ( select ph.&&Name&&, cast(null as text) as &&TablePartName&&, e.&&Id&&, e.&&Uid&&, e.&&TableName&& from &&WorkflowProcess&& wp inner join &&ProcessContext&& pc on wp.Context=pc.&&Id&& inner join &&MD_ENTITY&& e on e.&&Id&&=pc.&&Id&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& ph on wp.&&Header&& = ph.&&Id&& where (ph.&&Published&& = wp.&&Id&&) or ph.&&Current&& = wp.&&Id&& union all select t_Rec.&&Name&&, e.&&DisplayName&&, tp.&&Id&&, tp.&&TablePartPropertyUid&&, e.&&TableName&& from &&TablePartMetadata&& tp inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Id&& = tp.&&TablePartOwner&& inner join &&MD_ENTITY&& e on e.&&Id&&=tp.&&Id&& ) select t_Rec.&&Name&& as &&ProcessName&&, t_Rec.&&TablePartName&&, case when upper(ep.&&RelationTableName&&) = Upper(:tableName) then ep.&&DisplayName&& else null end as &&PropertyName&& from t_Rec left join &&MD_ENTITY_PROPERTY&& ep on ep.&&OwnerId&& = t_Rec.&&Id&& and ep.Uid<>:ownerUid where upper(t_Rec.&&TableName&&) = Upper(:tableName) and t_Rec.Uid<>:ownerUid or upper(ep.&&RelationTableName&&) = upper(:tableName)

with recursive t_Rec as ( select ph.&&Name&& as pName, cast(null as text) as &&TablePartName&&, e.&&Id&&, e.&&Uid&&, e.&&Name&& from &&WorkflowProcess&& wp inner join &&ProcessContext&& pc on wp.Context=pc.&&Id&& inner join &&MD_ENTITY&& e on e.&&Id&&=pc.&&Id&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& ph on wp.&&Header&& = ph.&&Id&& where (ph.&&Published&& = wp.&&Id&&) or ph.&&Current&& = wp.&&Id&& union all select t_Rec.&&pName&&, e.&&DisplayName&&, tp.&&Id&&, tp.&&TablePartPropertyUid&&, e.&&Name&& from &&TablePartMetadata&& tp inner join t_Rec on t_Rec.&&Id&& = tp.&&tablepartowner&& inner join &&MD_ENTITY&& e on e.&&Id&&=tp.&&Id&& ) select t_Rec.&&pName&& as &&ProcessName&&, t_Rec.&&TablePartName&& from t_Rec where upper(t_Rec.&&Name&&) = Upper(:className)

select distinct ph.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, ph.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, ph.&&ParentGroup&& as &&ParentId&&, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.&&CurrentInstanceCount&& else ci.&&CurrentInstanceEmlCount&& end) as &&AvailableCount&&, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.&&ActiveTasksCount&& else ci.&&ActiveTasksEmlCount&& end) as &&AssignToMeCount&&, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.&&CompletedInstanceCount&& else ci.&&CompletedInstanceEmlCount&& end) as &&CompleteCount&&, (case when :isEmulation = 0 then ci.&&TerminatedInstanceCount&& else ci.&&TerminatedInstanceEmlCount&& end) as &&InterruptedCount&& from &&ProcessHeader&& ph left join &&MonitorCacheItem&& ci on ci.&&ProcessHeader&& = ph.&&Id&& and (:filterByMembers = 0 and ci.&&User&& is null or ci.&&User&& = :currentUser) where (:processHeaderId = 0 or ph.&&Id&& = :processHeaderId) and (ph.&&Published&& is not null) and (ph.&&Status&& = :publishedStatus) and (:filterByMembers = 0 or exists( select wi.&&Id&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowInstanceMember&& wim on wim.&&User&& = :currentUser and wi.&&Id&& = wim.&&Instance&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wp.&&Header&& = ph.&&Id&& )) order by ph.&&Name&&

select distinct p.&&PermissionId&& as &&PermissionId&& from &&ProcessHeaderPermission&& p inner join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& c on p.&&UserSecuritySetCacheId&& = c.&&SetId&& where p.&&ProcessHeader&& = :headerId and c.&&UserId&& in (:userfilter)

WITH RECURSIVE wfi AS ( SELECT wi.&&Id&&, wp.&&Header&& as &&Header&& FROM &&WorkflowInstance&& as wi, &&WorkflowProcess&& as wp WHERE wi.&&Id&& = :instanceId AND wi.&&Process&& = wp.&&Id&& AND wi.&&Status&& not in (:deleteStatuses) UNION ALL SELECT wi.&&Id&&, wp.&&Header&& as &&Header&& FROM &&WorkflowInstance&& as wi, wfi, &&WorkflowProcess&& as wp WHERE wfi.&&Id&& = wi.&&ParentInstance&& AND wi.&&Process&& = wp.&&Id&& ), wfp AS ( SELECT &&Id&&, &&Header&& as &&Header&& FROM WorkflowProcess WHERE &&Id&& = :processId UNION ALL SELECT wp.&&Id&&, wp.&&Header&& as &&Header&& FROM &&WorkflowProcess&& as wp, wfp WHERE wfp.&&Id&& = wp.&&Parent&& ) SELECT wfi.&&Id&& as &&WfiId&&, wfp.&&Id&& as &&ProcessId&& FROM wfi, wfp WHERE wfi.&&Header&& = wfp.&&Header&&

select ph.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, ph.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, ph.&&ParentGroup&& as &&ParentId&&, ph.&&Parent&& as &&ParentProcessId&&, subq.&&AvailableCount&& as &&AvailableCount&&, subqt.&&AssignToMeCount&& as &&AssignToMeCount&&, subq.&&CompleteCount&& as &&CompleteCount&&, subq.&&InterruptedCount&& as &&InterruptedCount&&, coalesce(dep.&&UserId&&,oiu.&&UserId&&) &&OwnerId&&,
case when rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergroupitemtype then rm.&&WorkerType&& else case when us.&&Id&& is not null then rm.&&WorkerType&& else null end end
&&OwnerType&&, case when rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergroupitemtype then du.&&Name&& else case when us.&&Id&& is not null then us.&&FullName&& else dep.&&Name&& end end &&OwnerName&&, ph.&&Status&& &&Status&&
from &&ProcessHeader&& ph left join ( select head.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:AvailableStatus) then 1 else 0 end) as &&AvailableCount&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:CompleteStatus) then 1 else 0 end) as &&CompleteCount&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:InterruptedStatus) then 1 else 0 end) as &&InterruptedCount&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& head on head.&&Id&& = wp.&&Header&& where coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=:isemulationInstans group by head.&&Id&& ) as subq on subq.&&Id&& = ph.&&Id&&
left join ( select &&WorkerId&&, &&WorkerTyp&&e, &&BPMNProcess&& from &&ResponsibilityMatrixItem&& where &&ResponsibilityLevel&& = 2 group by &&WorkerId&&, &&WorkerType&&, &&BPMNProcess&& ) as rm on rm.&&BPMNProcess&&=ph.&&Published&& left join &&OrganizationItem&& dep on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and dep.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&User&& us on dep.&&UserId&& = us.&&Id&& left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& oiu on dep.&&Id&&=oiu.&&OrganizationItemId&& and oiu.&&UserId&& = us.&&Id&& left join &&UserGroup&& du on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergroupitemtype and du.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&&
left join ( select phe.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, count(tb.&&Id&&) as &&AssignToMeCount&& from &&TaskBase&& tb inner join &&WorkflowBookmark&& wb on wb.&&Id&& = tb.&&WorkflowBookmark&& inner join &&WorkflowInstance&& wi on wi.&&Id&& = wb.&&Instance&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wpr on wpr.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& phe on phe.&&Id&& = wpr.&&Header&& where (tb.&&Status&& in (:activeTaskStatuses)) and coalesce(tb.&&IsEmulation&&,0) = :isemulationTask group by phe.&&Id&& ) as subqt on subqt.&&Id&& = ph.&&Id&& where ph.&&Published&& is not null and (:noSearchNameProcess = 0 or upper(ph.&&Name&&) like :NameProcess) and (0 in (:listUser) or (rm.&&WorkerId&& in ( select distinct oi.&&Id&& from &&OrganizationItem&& oi left join &&User&& u on oi.&&UserId&&=u.&&Id&& and u.&&Id&& in (:listUser) left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& oiu on oi.&&Id&&=oiu.&&OrganizationItemId&& and oiu.&&UserId&& in (:listUser) where (oiu.&&UserId&& is not null or u.&&Id&& is not null) ) and rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype))
order by &&Name&&

select ph.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, ph.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, ph.&&CreationDate&& as &&CreationDate&&, ph.&&CreationAuthor&& as &&CreationAuthorId&&, u.&&FullName&& as "&&CreationAuthor&&", ph.&&ParentGroup&& as &&ParentId&&, ph.&&Parent&& as &&ParentProcessId&&, coalesce(dep.&&UserId&&, oiu.&&UserId&&) &&WorkerId&&, case when rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergroupitemtype then rm.&&WorkerType&& else case when us.&&Id&& is not null then rm.&&WorkerType&& else null end end &&WorkerType&&, case when rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergroupitemtype then du.&&Name&& else case when us.&&Id&& is not null then us.&&FullName&& else dep.&&Name&& end end &&WorkerName&&, wp.&&VersionNumber&& as &&VersionNumber&&, ph.&&Published&& as &&CurrentVersionId&&, ph.&&Status&& as &&Status&& from &&ProcessHeader&& ph inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = ph.&&Published&& inner join &&User&& u on u.&&Id&& = ph.&&CreationAuthor&& left join ( select &&WorkerId&&, &&WorkerType&&, &&BPMNProcess&& from &&ResponsibilityMatrixItem&& where &&ResponsibilityLevel&& = 2 group by &&WorkerId&&, &&WorkerType&&, &&BPMNProcess&& ) rm on rm.&&BPMNProcess&& = ph.&&Published&& left join ORGANIZATIONITEM dep on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and dep.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&UserGroup&& du on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergroupitemtype and du.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&User&& us on dep.&&UserId&& = us.&&Id&& left join OrganizationItemUsers oiu on dep.&&Id&&=oiu.OrganizationItemId and oiu.&&UserId&& = us.&&Id&& where ph.&&Published&& is not null

select {processHeader.*} from &&ProcessHeader&& {processHeader} where {processHeader}.&&Published&& is not null and {processHeader}.&&Id&& in ( select wp.&&Header&& from &&ResponsibilityMatrixItem&& rm left join &&OrganizationItem&& dep on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and dep.&&Id&& = rm.&&WorkerId&& left join &&OrganizationItemUsers&& du on rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&OrganizationItemId&& = dep.&&Id&& left join &&UserSecuritySetCache&& agu on rm.&&WorkerType&&=:usergrouptype and agu.&&GroupId&&=rm.&&WorkerId&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on rm.&&BPMNProcess&& = wp.&&Id&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& ph on ph.&&Id&& = wp.&&Header&& where ph.&&Published&& = wp.&&Id&& and (rm.&&ResponsibilityLevel&& = 2 or rm.&&IsCurator&& = 1) and ((dep.&&UserId&& = :userfilter or rm.&&WorkerType&& = :orgitemtype and du.&&UserId&& = :userfilter) or (rm.&&WorkerType&& = :usergrouptype and agu.&&UserId&& = :userfilter)) )

select ph.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, ph.&&Name&& as &&Name&&, subq.&&AvailableCount&& as &&AvailableCount&&, subqt.&&AssignToMeCount&& as &&AssignToMeCount&&, subq.&&CompleteCount&& as &&CompleteCount&&, subq.&&InterruptedCount&& as &&InterruptedCount&&, subq.&&AvailableCountEml&& as &&AvailableCountEml&&, subqt.&&AssignToMeCountEml&& as &&AssignToMeCountEml&&, subq.&&CompleteCountEml&& as &&CompleteCountEml&&, subq.&&InterruptedCountEml&& as &&InterruptedCountEml && from &&ProcessHeader&& ph left join ( select head.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:AvailableStatus) and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&AvailableCount&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:CompleteStatus) and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CompleteCount&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:InterruptedStatus) and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&InterruptedCount&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:AvailableStatus) and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&AvailableCountEml&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:CompleteStatus) and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CompleteCountEml&&, sum(case when wi.&&Status&& in (:InterruptedStatus) and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&InterruptedCountEml&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& head on head.&&Id&& = wp.&&Header&& group by head.&&Id&& ) as subq on subq.&&Id&& = ph.&&Id&& left join ( select phe.&&Id&& as &&Id&&, sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&AssignToMeCount&&, sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0)=1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&AssignToMeCountEml&& from &&TaskBase&& tb inner join &&WorkflowBookmark&& wb on wb.&&Id&& = tb.&&WorkflowBookmark&& inner join &&WorkflowInstance&& wi on wi.&&Id&& = wb.&&Instance&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wpr on wpr.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& phe on phe.&&Id&& = wpr.&&Header&& where (tb.&&Status&& in (:activeTaskStatuses)) group by phe.&&Id&& ) as subqt on subqt.&&Id&& = ph.&&Id&& left join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on ph.&&Published&& = wp.&&Id&&

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountRes&&, sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountResEml&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wp.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.&&Status&& = :wiStatus

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountRes&&, sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountResEml&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wp.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.&&Status&& = :wiStatus and exists(select &&Id&& from &&WorkflowInstanceMember&& where &&User&& = :currentUser and Instance = wi.&&Id&&)

select m.&&User&& as &&Id&&, count(distinct wi.&&Id&&) as &&CountRes&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& inner join &&WorkflowInstanceMember&& m on m.&&Instance&& = wi.&&Id&& where wp.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.&&Status&& = :wiStatus and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = :isEmulation group by m.&&User&&

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountRes&&, sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountResEml&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wp.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.&&Status&& in (:wiStatus)

select m.&&User&& as &&Id&&, count(distinct wi.&&Id&&) as &&CountRes&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& inner join &&WorkflowInstanceMember&& m on m.&&Instance&& = wi.&&Id&& where wp.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.&&Status&& in (:wiStatus) and coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&,0) = :isEmulation group by m.&&User&&

select sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountRes&&, sum(case when coalesce(wi.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountResEml&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wp.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and wi.&&Status&& in (:wiStatus) and exists(select &&Id&& from &&WorkflowInstanceMember&& where &&User&& = :currentUser and &&Instance&& = wi.&&Id&&)

select sum(case when coalesce(tb.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountRes&&, sum(case when coalesce(tb.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountResEml&& from &&TaskBase&& tb inner join &&WorkflowBookmark&& wb on wb.&&Id&& = tb.&&WorkflowBookmark&& inner join &&WorkflowInstance&& wi on wi.&&Id&& = wb.&&Instance&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wpr on wpr.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wpr.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and (tb.&&Status&& in (:wiStatus))

select sum(case when coalesce(tb.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountRes&&, sum(case when coalesce(tb.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as &&CountResEml&& from &&TaskBase&& tb inner join &&WorkflowBookmark&& wb on wb.&&Id&& = tb.&&WorkflowBookmark&& inner join &&WorkflowInstance&& wi on wi.&&Id&& = wb.&&Instance&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wpr on wpr.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wpr.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and (tb.&&Status&& in (:wiStatus)) and tb.&&Executor&& = :currentUser

select tb.&&Executor&& as &&Id&&, count(tb.&&Id&&) as &&CountRes&& from &&TaskBase&& tb inner join &&WorkflowBookmark&& wb on wb.&&Id&& = tb.&&WorkflowBookmark&& inner join &&WorkflowInstance&& wi on wi.&&Id&& = wb.&&Instance&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wpr on wpr.&&Id&& = wi.&&Process&& where wpr.&&Header&& = :ProcessHeaderId and (tb.&&Status&& in (:wiStatus)) and coalesce(tb.&&IsEmulation&&, 0) = :isEmulation group by tb.&&Executor&&

insert into &&EntityModelHistory&&(&&Id&&, &&CreationDate&&, &&CreationAuthor&&, &&ActionTypeUid&&, &&ObjectTypeUid&&, &&ObjectUid&&, &&ObjectId&&) select nextval('g_entitymodelhistory') , :CreationDate, :CreationAuthor, :ActionTypeUid, t.&&TypeUid&&, t.&&Uid&&, t.&&Id&& from &&TaskBase&& t left join &&WorkflowBookmark&& b on b.&&Id&&=t.&&WorkflowBookmark&& where b.&&Instance&&=:Instance

procedure.name: FindProcessesByHeaderUid

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select * from FindProcessesByHeaderUid(:ProcessHeaderUid)

procedure.text: create or replace function FindProcessesByHeaderUid(ProcessHeaderUid uuid) returns setof uuid as $$ declare resultProcessUid uuid; begin for resultProcessUid in select &&Uid&& from ( with recursive &&RootHeader&& as ( select p.&&Uid&&, p.&&Parent&&, 0 as lvl from &&ProcessHeader&& p where p.&&Uid&& = ProcessHeaderUid union all select ph.&&Uid&&, ph.&&Parent&&, &&RootHeader&&.lvl + 1 from &&ProcessHeader&& ph inner join &&RootHeader&& on &&RootHeader&&.&&Parent&& = ph.&&Id&& ), &&TopRecord&& as ( select &&RootHeader&&.&&Uid&&, &&RootHeader&&.lvl from &&RootHeader&& order by &&RootHeader&&.lvl desc limit 1 ), &&FindProcesses&& as ( select p.&&Id&&, wp.&&Uid&& from &&ProcessHeader&& p inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = p.&&Current&& inner join &&TopRecord&& tr on tr.&&Uid&& = p.&&Uid&& union all select ph.&&Id&&, wp.&&Uid&& from &&ProcessHeader&& ph inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wp.&&Id&& = ph.&&Current&& inner join &&FindProcesses&& on &&FindProcesses&&.&&Id&& = ph.&&Parent&& ) select &&Uid&& from &&FindProcesses&& ) as &&AllProcesses&& loop return next resultProcessUid; end loop; return; end $$ language plpgsql;

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: delete from &&FormDependencies&& where &&DependObjectUid&& is null and &&DependObjectFormUid&& is null and &&UsesObjectFormUid&& is null and &&Type&& is null and &&UsesObjectUid&& in (:ProcessUids)

script.name: FillWorkflowInstanceParents1
script.text: with recursive Rec as ( select &&Id&& &&Child&&, &&ParentInstance&& &&Parent&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& where not &&ParentInstance&& is null union all select Rec.&&Child&&, wi.&&ParentInstance&& from &&WorkflowInstance&& wi inner join Rec on Rec.&&Parent&& = wi.&&Id&& and not wi.&&ParentInstance&& is null ) insert into &&WorkflowInstanceParents&& (&&Child&&, &&Parent&&, &&Internal&&) select rec.&&Child&&, rec.&&Parent&&, (case when ph.&&Parent&& is null then 0 else 1 end) from Rec rec inner join &&WorkflowInstance&& wi on rec.&&Child&& = wi.&&Id&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wi.&&Process&& = wp.&&Id&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& ph on wp.&&Header&& = ph.&&Id&&

script.name: UpdateInternalWorkflowInstanceParents
script.text: update &&WorkflowInstanceParents&& wip set &&Internal&& = 1 from &&WorkflowInstanceParents&& rec inner join &&WorkflowInstance&& wi on rec.&&Child&& = wi.&&Id&& inner join &&WorkflowProcess&& wp on wi.&&Process&& = wp.&&Id&& inner join &&ProcessHeader&& ph on wp.&&Header&& = ph.&&Id&& where ph.&&Parent&& is not null and rec.&&Parent&& = wip.&&Parent&& and rec.&&Child&& = wip.&&Child&& and wip.&&Parent&& != wip.&&Child&&;
